title: Koushi Becomes a Dorm Mother / The Problem with Mineru and Frey
overview: The homeless and desperate Koushi has been offered a job! But after a bad first impression, Atena will need time to adjust to the idea of Koushi living at the Goddess’ Dorm.

title: The Problem with Kiriya and Serene / Atena Awakens
overview: How has Koushi managed to befriend the dorm residents so quickly? Atena think he’s super sus! But when a shopping trip goes awry, will she be able to accept his help?

title: Koushi, at a Loss / Koushi Goes Back to School
overview: Now that he’s settled into his new life, Koushi returns to school! Everyone wants to know where he’s been, but will Koushi’s childhood friend, Sutea, appreciate the truth?

title: A Childhood Friend Visits the Dorm / Koushi Goes Undercover at a Women's College
overview: Sutea meets the residents of the Goddess’ Dorm, with mixed results. Later, Koushi goes undercover at the college and lands in hot water.

title: Serene the Shut-in / The Goddess Dormitory Goes on Vacation
overview: It’s time for some fun in the sun during summer break, only Serene doesn’t seem too keen on the idea. Time to help out the dorm’s most mysterious member!

title: Sutea Ponders About the Sea / Koushi Makes His Cosplay Debut
overview: Koushi plays lifeguard on duty as the dorm’s beach vacation continues. Back at home, he takes a trip into the cosplay closet with Frey.

title: The School Festival at Seikan Women's University
overview: Koushi doesn’t have to wear a disguise for Seikan’s school festival, so that means he and Sutea can experience something normal for once. Right…?

title: Kiriya Wishes Upon a Christmas
overview: Kiriya’s family always throws a Christmas party for their dojo, but this year she’ll have to run it all by herself! Can Koushi and Atena help her spread some holiday cheer?

title: Sutea Reflects on the Kotatsu / Koushi Tackles Spring Cleaning
overview: A kotatsu brings warmth into the household… warmth and shenanigans, that is. Will Kouichi be able to break free of the kotatsu’s cozy clutches?

title: The Goddesses of the Goddess Dormitory
overview: When Koushi falls ill just before New Year’s, the dorm residents must rally to nurse him back to health… but their efforts may do more harm than good.
